data.content:
## Implementation Plan

### Summary
Change `buildWorkflowStateCommand` in `memory-manager-commands.ts` so that the knots branch generates `kno next <id>` instead of `kno update <id> --status <state>`. The beads branch remains unchanged.

### Changes

**File: `src/lib/memory-manager-commands.ts`**
- Modify `buildWorkflowStateCommand` (line 43-44): For knots, return `kno next <id>` instead of `kno update <id> --status <state>`.
- The `workflowState` parameter is ignored for knots since `kno next` determines the next state automatically.
- Signature stays the same to avoid breaking the beads callers.

**File: `src/lib/terminal-manager.ts`**
- `buildGranularProgressionCommands` (line 124-143): Since every call to `buildWorkflowStateCommand` for knots now returns the same `kno next <id>`, deduplicate so only one `kno next <id>` command is emitted instead of N identical ones. For beads, keep per-state commands.
- `buildSingleTargetFollowUpLines` (line 167): No change needed since it calls `buildWorkflowStateCommand` which will now return the correct knots command.

**File: `src/lib/__tests__/memory-manager-commands-coverage.test.ts`**
- Update test expectations for knots branch to expect `kno next <id>` instead of `kno update <id> --status <state>`.
- The lowercase normalization test for knots state is no longer relevant (state is ignored), remove or adjust.

### Risks
- Low: The change is narrow and well-tested.
- The beads path is untouched.

### Complexity
Small — 3 files, ~10 lines changed.
